Aquapolis Card List

E-Card series · Released January 15, 2003 · 182 cards

Browse the full Aquapolis set. Tap any card to check its value, rarity and pricing history in the TCG Companion app.

Heads up: eBay links below are affiliate links. If you buy through one, TCG Companion earns a small commission from eBay — at no extra cost to you. Full disclosure.

Check Aquapolis card values

Scan a card with your phone camera and get the current market price in seconds. TCG Companion covers every English Pokémon set, tracks your collection value, and spots fakes before you buy.

Download on the App Store

Browse all sets · Pokémon card value checker

TCG Companion

Scan any Pokémon card. See the price. Track your collection.

  • Pokémon card scanner

Affiliate disclosure: As an eBay Partner Network affiliate and a Vault X affiliate, TCG Companion earns from qualifying purchases. The price you pay doesn't change — full disclosure.
